title: SACRAMENTO, CA – In less than 24 hours, President Donald Trump will officially place countless LGBTQ+ youth lives on the line—fulfilling a dangerous promise to eradicate DEI initia
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: In the United States, 20% of surveyed LGBTQ+ students reported having attempted suicide.
The suicide attempt rate for transgender high school students is nearly 26%.
Schools were the third most common location for hate crimes reported against LGBTQ+ youth in the U.S. according to the FBI.
Hate crimes against LGBTQ+ youth in schools more than doubled between 2018 and 2022.
The federal 988 funding for mental health services has been eliminated.
There is an urgent need for visible, accessible mental health resources for LGBTQ+ youth.
